title: Welfare scheme execution becomes election issue in Alinagar
snippet_text: Local reports indicate that MGNREGA work allocations and PMAY home delivery rates are taking center stage in public debates across Alinagar assembly segment.

title: Bihar Elections 2025: Key issues dominate debates in Alinagar
snippet_text: As the election campaign intensifies, voters in Alinagar assembly constituency raise questions about infrastructure development, road connectivity, and agricultural support schemes.

title: Political rally in Alinagar draws massive crowds ahead of voting day
snippet_text: Top party leaders addressed a massive rally in Alinagar promising job creations, free electricity, and specialized sub-plans for rural developmental bounds.
